author: Adware
text:
Burn §16 bl doctor out of the architecture spec

Doctor failed the test: an agent with the skill doc gains no meaningful
fix-success from its existence. 5/8 checks fail loud already (git/the op
surfaces them); the 3 silent ones (bin/<name> dangle, protocol drift,
blocker cycle) move to point-of-use errors naming the fix verb. A fixed
checklist covers only KNOWN drift, helping least on the weird cases agents
actually get stuck on. No-repair-verb principle survives without the section.

Removed §16 entirely, renumbered §17 migration→§16, scrubbed all doctor
cross-refs (§1 log, §8 op-families, §9 read verbs, §10 cycle, §11 teardown,
§15 changelog, §16 migration tail), and logged the subtraction in §15.
Code removal tracked separately as bl-a38e.
